    A

    AddEditEmployeeDialogController - Class in org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.controller
     
    AddEditEmployeeDialogController() - Constructor for class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.controller.AddEditEmployeeDialogController
     
    addMenuItem() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI.cashierController
    Opens a dialog to add a new menu item, optionally with recipe ingredients, then refreshes the menu table on success.
    addMenuItem(String, double, String, List) - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI.cashierModel
    Adds a new menu item to the POS and optionally associates recipe ingredients.
    addOrder() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI.cashierController
    Adds the currently selected menu item to the active order and updates total.
    addOrder(String, String, String) - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI.cashierModel
    Adds one selected menu item to the active in-memory order.

    B

    backToManager() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.InventoryGUI.DatabaseController
    Returns to the manager dashboard by closing the inventory window.

    C

    Cashier - Class in org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI
    Launches the cashier-facing JavaFX application window.
    Cashier() - Constructor for class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI.Cashier
     
    cashierController - Class in org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI
    Controller for the cashier point-of-sale JavaFX view.
    cashierController() - Constructor for class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI.cashierController
     
    CashierController - Class in org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.controller
    Controller for the Cashier Dashboard UI.
    CashierController() - Constructor for class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.controller.CashierController
     
    cashierModel - Class in org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI
    Data and persistence model for the cashier workflow.
    cashierModel() - Constructor for class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI.cashierModel
    Creates the cashier model, loads environment-backed database settings, and initializes menu data from the database.
    cashierModel.InventoryOption - Class in org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI
    Inventory option DTO used by the Add Menu Item ingredient dropdown.
    cashierModel.RecipeIngredient - Class in org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI
    Immutable ingredient mapping used when creating recipe associations.
    checkOrderEmpty() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI.cashierModel
    Indicates whether the active order contains no items.
    clearOrderList() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI.cashierModel
    Clears the in-memory active order list after submission or cancellation.
    create(Employee) - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.dao.EmployeeDao
    Creates a new employee record in the database.
    create(MenuItem) - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.dao.MenuItemDao
    Creates a new menu item in the database.

    Represents an employee within the POS system.

    Data Access Object (DAO) for performing CRUD operations on Employee records.

    EmployeeTabHelper - Class in org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.controller
    Handles all Employees-tab logic, extracted from ManagerController.

    Creates an EmployeeTabHelper instance.
    exportReportCSV() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.controller.ReportTabHelper
    Saves the current text report as a CSV file in the user's Downloads folder.

    F

    findAll() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.dao.EmployeeDao
    Retrieves all employees from the database, ordered by employee number.
    findAll() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.dao.MenuItemDao
    Returns a list of all menu items in the database, ordered by ID.
    findByEmail(String) - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.dao.EmployeeDao
    Finds an employee by their email address.
    findById(int) - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.dao.MenuItemDao
    Finds a single menu item by its ID.

    Runs the report generation process using the ReportTabHelper.

    Generates the selected report based on the date range you select.

    Retrieves the stored password hash for a given employee.

    Returns the formatted menu item price.

    goBackToManager() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI.cashierController
    Navigates from cashier view to the manager dashboard.
    goToCashierView() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.controller.ManagerController
    Opens the Cashier view and passes the manager's info so the cashier screen knows who is logged in.

    I

    init() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.controller.EmployeeTabHelper
    Initializes the EmployeeTabHelper by setting up the table columns, search filter, buttons, and loading the employee data from the database.
    init() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.controller.ReportTabHelper
    Sets up the report tab by adding report types to the dropdown and loading inventory items for the chart.
    initialize() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI.cashierController
    Initializes JavaFX table bindings, model state, and the real-time clock.
    initialize() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.InventoryGUI.DatabaseController
    Initializes the controller after the FXML has been loaded.
    initialize() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.controller.AddEditEmployeeDialogController
    Loads the available employee roles into the dropdown menu.
    initialize() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.controller.CashierController
     
    initialize() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.controller.LoginController
     
    initialize() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.controller.ManagerController
    Initializes all tabs in the Manager view.

    Model class representing a single row from the Inventory table.

    Creates an inventory item record.

    L

    load() - Static method in class org.posSystem.util.DotenvLoader
    Returns a cached { Dotenv} instance, loading it on first access.
    LoginController - Class in org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.controller
    Handles the login logic for both managers and cashiers.

    logout() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI.cashierController
    Navigates from cashier view back to the login screen.
    logout() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.InventoryGUI.DatabaseController
    Logs out the current user by switching back to the login screen.
    logout() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.controller.ManagerController
    Logs the manager out and returns to the login screen.

    Opens the Inventory Management window in a new stage.

    Creates an order table row snapshot for JavaFX rendering.

    Computes the total price for all items currently in the active order.

    Removes the currently selected order item and updates total.

    Injects employee details into the cashier view after login.

    Sets the type or category of the menu item.
    setManagerInfo(String, int) - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.controller.ManagerController
    Stores the manager's name and ID after login so it can be passed to other screens like the Cashier view.

    Initializes and displays the primary JavaFX stage for the cashier UI.

    start(Stage) - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.ManagerGUI.Main
    Starts the JavaFX application by loading the login scene and displaying it on the primary stage.
    submitOrder() - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI.cashierController
    Submits the current order to persistence and resets the local order state.
    submitOrder(int, String) - Method in class org.posSystem.FrontendGUI.CashierGUI.cashierModel
    Persists the current order to database order tables as a single transaction.
